Name: FDynamicTextureInstance
Description: Serialized ULevel information about dynamic texture instances

Variables.Name: Texture
Variables.Description: Texture that is used by a dynamic UPrimitiveComponent.

Variables.Name: bAttached
Variables.Description: Whether the primitive that uses this texture is attached to the scene or not.

Variables.Name: OriginalRadius
Variables.Description: Original bounding sphere radius, at the time the TexelFactor was calculated originally.
